text.raw:
Level 3: Circle of the Land Spells

Whenever you finish a Long Rest, choose one type
of land: arid, polar, temperate, or tropical. Consult
the table below that corresponds to the chosen
type; you have the spells listed for your Druid level
and lower prepared.

Arid Land

Druid Level

Circle Spells


Blur, Burning Hands, Fire Bolt


Fireball


Blight


Wall of Stone

Polar Land
Druid Level

Circle Spells


Fog Cloud, Hold Person, Ray of Frost


Sleet Storm


Ice Storm


Cone of Cold

Temperate Land
Druid Level

Circle Spells


Misty Step, Shocking Grasp, Sleep


Lightning Bolt


Freedom of Movement


Tree Stride

Tropical Land
Druid Level


Circle Spells


Acid Splash, Ray of Sickness, Web


Stinking Cloud


Polymorph


Insect Plague
